bead.title: Replace the root README with release-ready user docs
bead.description: Replace the placeholder root README.md using docs/release/release-infrastructure-plan.md. Current state: README.md contains only a one-line project title. In-scope files: README.md, crates/heimq/README.md only if linked or kept consistent, charts/heimq/README.md only if quickstart needs alignment. Required content: project purpose and non-goals, source quickstart, Docker quickstart, Helm quickstart, basic producer/consumer smoke test, compatibility and limits, release artifact locations, test and benchmark commands, contribution/development setup. Out of scope: microsite implementation and workflow behavior changes.
bead.acceptance:
1. `grep -q "Quick start" README.md` passes.
2. `grep -q "Docker" README.md` and `grep -q "Helm" README.md` pass.
3. README.md documents release artifact locations and test/benchmark commands.
4. README.md documents compatibility limits and non-goals.
5. Local links in README.md point to existing files or workflows.
6. `cargo fmt --all -- --check` passes.
